inputs.label: Number of Spins
inputs.businessContext: Total number of roulette wheel spins to analyze.

inputs.label: Numbers Covered per Spin
inputs.businessContext: Quantity of numbers wagered on in each spin (e.g., 1 for straight-up).

inputs.label: Payout Multiplier
inputs.businessContext: Payout ratio for a winning spin (e.g., 35 for straight-up bet in European roulette).

inputs.label: Bet Amount per Spin
inputs.businessContext: Wager placed on each individual spin.

inputs.label: Total Numbers on Wheel
inputs.businessContext: Total pockets (37 for European single-zero, 38 for American double-zero).
